Title: The Goldbergs
Actors: Wendi McLendon-Covey, Sean Giambrone, Troy Gentile
Plot: Before there were parenting blogs, trophies for showing up, and peanut allergies, there was a simpler time called the '80s. For geeky 11-year old Adam these were his wonder years and he faced them armed with a video camera to capture all the crazy.
